descriptions.npc_introduction: A tall, broad-shouldered man with dark hair and charcoal robes. His appearance makes you a little uncomfortable, but you can't put a finger on why. He stands near the podium at the head of the aisle of the church, seemingly deep in thought.

conversation_parts.start: Well, good to see you finally arrived, [[playername]]. Everyone else has long gone, but I could still use your help, if you're willing.
conversation_parts.end: Alright. Enough for now then, I suppose.
